infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SkillMatch needs camera access to take photos for your service listings.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SkillMatch needs photo library access to upload images for your service listings.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SkillMatch needs your location to show nearby services.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: SkillMatch uses your location to recommend nearby services.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow SkillMatch to access your camera for service photos.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow SkillMatch to access your photos for service listings.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow SkillMatch to use your location to find nearby services.
